14/*
15 * File auto-generated by src/common/unicode/generate-unicode_case_table.pl,
16 * do not edit. There is deliberately not an #ifndef PG_UNICODE_CASE_TABLE_H
17 * here.
18 */
19
20#include "common/unicode_case.h"
21#include "mb/pg_wchar.h"
22
23/*
24 * The maximum number of codepoints that can result from case mapping
25 * of a single character. See Unicode section 5.18 "Case Mappings".
26 */
27#define MAX_CASE_EXPANSION 3
28
29/*
30 * Case mapping condition flags. For now, only Final_Sigma is supported.
31 *
32 * See Unicode Context Specification for Casing.
33 */
34#define PG_U_FINAL_SIGMA		(1 << 0)
35
36typedef enum
37{
38	CaseLower = 0,
39	CaseTitle = 1,
40	CaseUpper = 2,
41	CaseFold = 3,
42	NCaseKind
43} CaseKind;
44
45typedef struct
46{
47	int16		conditions;
48	pg_wchar	map[NCaseKind][MAX_CASE_EXPANSION];
49} pg_special_case;
50
51/*
52 * Special case mappings that aren't representable in the simple map.
53 * Entries are referenced from simple_case_map.
54 */

13516
13517
13518/*
13519 * case_index()
13520 *
13521 * Given a code point, compute the index in the case_map at which we can find
13522 * the offset into the mapping tables.
13523 */
13524static inline uint16
13525case_index(pg_wchar cp)
13526{
13527	/* Fast path for codepoints < 0x0588 */
13528	if (cp < 0x0588)
13529	{
13530		return case_map[cp];
13531	}
13532
13533	if (cp < 0xABC0)
13534	{
13535		if (cp < 0x2185)
13536		{
13537			if (cp >= 0x10A0 && cp < 0x1100)
13538			{
13539				return case_map[cp - 0x10A0 + 1416];
13540			}
13541			else if (cp >= 0x13A0)
13542			{
13543				if (cp < 0x13FE)
13544				{
13545					return case_map[cp - 0x13A0 + 1512];
13546				}
13547				else if (cp >= 0x1C80)
13548				{
13549					return case_map[cp - 0x1C80 + 1606];
13550				}
13551			}
13552		}
13553		else if (cp >= 0x24B6)
13554		{
13555			if (cp < 0x2D2E)
13556			{
13557				if (cp < 0x24EA)
13558				{
13559					return case_map[cp - 0x24B6 + 2891];
13560				}
13561				else if (cp >= 0x2C00)
13562				{
13563					return case_map[cp - 0x2C00 + 2943];
13564				}
13565			}
13566			else if (cp >= 0xA640)
13567			{
13568				if (cp < 0xA7F7)
13569				{
13570					return case_map[cp - 0xA640 + 3245];
13571				}
13572				else if (cp >= 0xAB53)
13573				{
13574					return case_map[cp - 0xAB53 + 3684];
13575				}
13576			}
13577		}
13578	}
13579	else if (cp >= 0xFB00)
13580	{
13581		if (cp < 0x10D86)
13582		{
13583			if (cp < 0xFF5B)
13584			{
13585				if (cp < 0xFB18)
13586				{
13587					return case_map[cp - 0xFB00 + 3793];
13588				}
13589				else if (cp >= 0xFF21)
13590				{
13591					return case_map[cp - 0xFF21 + 3817];
13592				}
13593			}
13594			else if (cp >= 0x10400)
13595			{
13596				if (cp < 0x105BD)
13597				{
13598					return case_map[cp - 0x10400 + 3875];
13599				}
13600				else if (cp >= 0x10C80)
13601				{
13602					return case_map[cp - 0x10C80 + 4320];
13603				}
13604			}
13605		}
13606		else if (cp >= 0x118A0)
13607		{
13608			if (cp < 0x16E80)
13609			{
13610				if (cp < 0x118E0)
13611				{
13612					return case_map[cp - 0x118A0 + 4582];
13613				}
13614				else if (cp >= 0x16E40)
13615				{
13616					return case_map[cp - 0x16E40 + 4646];
13617				}
13618			}
13619			else if (cp >= 0x1E900)
13620			{
13621				if (cp < 0x1E944)
13622				{
13623					return case_map[cp - 0x1E900 + 4710];
13624				}
13625			}
13626		}
13627	}
13628
13629	return 0;
13630}
